languages.original_text: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

languages.text: "Следование догмам действительно упрощает бытие, сестра Арджента, но упрощение в моем искусстве недопустимо. Боюсь, что смирение придется проявить вам, ибо я не намерен ни прекращать свои изыскания, ни отказываться от привычных методологий и канонов в угоду вашим требованиям".

"Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."
languages.original_text: "Следование догмам действительно упрощает бытие, сестра Арджента, но упрощение в моем искусстве недопустимо. Боюсь, что смирение придется проявить вам, ибо я не намерен ни прекращать свои изыскания, ни отказываться от привычных методологий и канонов в угоду вашим требованиям".

traits.locale_text: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

"Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

"Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

languages.text: «Adherirse al dogma simplifica mucho las cosas, hermana Argenta. Sin embargo, mi arte no tolera la simplificación. Me temo que tendrá que ser humilde, porque no tengo intención de detener mi investigación ni abandonar mis metodologías y cánones habituales solo para satisfacer sus exigencias».
languages.original_text: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

traits.locale_text: «Adherirse al dogma simplifica mucho las cosas, hermana Argenta. Sin embargo, mi arte no tolera la simplificación. Me temo que tendrá que ser humilde, porque no tengo intención de detener mi investigación ni abandonar mis metodologías y cánones habituales solo para satisfacer sus exigencias».

languages.text: 「教義に従うことは、確かに物事を単純にします、シスター・アルジェンタ。しかしながら、私の術は単純化を許しません。心を低くしていただかねばならぬのは、あなたの方ではないかと存じます。私は研究をやめるつもりもなければ、あなたの要求を満たすためだけに、いつもの方法論や規範を放棄するつもりもないのですから」
languages.original_text: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

traits.locale_text: 「教義に従うことは、確かに物事を単純にします、シスター・アルジェンタ。しかしながら、私の術は単純化を許しません。心を低くしていただかねばならぬのは、あなたの方ではないかと存じます。私は研究をやめるつもりもなければ、あなたの要求を満たすためだけに、いつもの方法論や規範を放棄するつもりもないのですから」

languages.text: “坚守教条的确能简化问题，阿洁塔修女。然而，我的技艺容不得简化。恐怕需要谦卑的是你，因为我既不打算停止我的研究，也不会仅仅为了满足你的要求而放弃我惯用的方法和准则。”
languages.original_text: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

traits.locale_text: “坚守教条的确能简化问题，阿洁塔修女。然而，我的技艺容不得简化。恐怕需要谦卑的是你，因为我既不打算停止我的研究，也不会仅仅为了满足你的要求而放弃我惯用的方法和准则。”

languages.text: "Das Festhalten an Dogmen vereinfacht die Dinge, Schwester Argenta. Allerdings duldet meine Kunst keine Simplifizierung. Ich fürchte, Ihr werdet demütig sein müssen, denn ich werde weder meine Forschung einstellen, noch auf mein gewohnten Methoden verzichten, um Eure Bedürfnisse zu stillen."
languages.original_text: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

traits.locale_text: "Das Festhalten an Dogmen vereinfacht die Dinge, Schwester Argenta. Allerdings duldet meine Kunst keine Simplifizierung. Ich fürchte, Ihr werdet demütig sein müssen, denn ich werde weder meine Forschung einstellen, noch auf mein gewohnten Methoden verzichten, um Eure Bedürfnisse zu stillen."

languages.text: « Il est vrai que l'adhésion sans réserve au dogme simplifie les choses, Sœur Argenta. Cependant, mon art ne saurait tolérer la simplification. Je crains que ce ne soit plutôt à vous de faire preuve d'humilité, car je n'ai nulle intention de cesser mes recherches, pas plus que d'abandonner ma méthodologie et mes préceptes pour satisfaire vos exigences. »
languages.original_text: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

traits.locale_text: « Il est vrai que l'adhésion sans réserve au dogme simplifie les choses, Sœur Argenta. Cependant, mon art ne saurait tolérer la simplification. Je crains que ce ne soit plutôt à vous de faire preuve d'humilité, car je n'ai nulle intention de cesser mes recherches, pas plus que d'abandonner ma méthodologie et mes préceptes pour satisfaire vos exigences. »

languages.text: "Dogmalara bağlı kalmak işleri gerçekten basitleştiriyor Rahibe Argenta. Ancak benim sanatım, basitleştirmeyi kaldırmaz. Korkarım ki alçakgönüllü olması gereken sensin. Zira araştırmamı bırakmaya ya da sırf senin taleplerini karşılamak için alışılmış yöntemlerimi ve nizamnamelerimi terk etmeye hiç niyetim yok."
languages.original_text: "Adhering to dogma truly does simplify matters, Sister Argenta. However, my art does not tolerate simplification. I fear it is you who will have to be humble, for I have no intention of ceasing my research, nor will I abandon my usual methodologies and canons merely to satisfy your demands."

traits.locale_text: "Dogmalara bağlı kalmak işleri gerçekten basitleştiriyor Rahibe Argenta. Ancak benim sanatım, basitleştirmeyi kaldırmaz. Korkarım ki alçakgönüllü olması gereken sensin. Zira araştırmamı bırakmaya ya da sırf senin taleplerini karşılamak için alışılmış yöntemlerimi ve nizamnamelerimi terk etmeye hiç niyetim yok."
